basic_details.job_title: IIT Gandhinagar Program Manager I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar has released the official Program Manager-I Recruitment 2026 Notification on 04 May 2026 at the official website IIT Gandhinagar Official Website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the IIT Gandhinagar Program Manager-I Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged up to 40 years with qualifications including B.Tech, B.E, M.Sc, M.C.A, MBA or equivalent professional qualifications along with minimum 5 years of post-qualification experience can apply online on or before 10 May 2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are a

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech./B.E./M.Sc./M.C.A./MBA/Professional qualification or equivalent with minimum 05 years post-qualification experience in planning and development/Administration/Project Management, Minimum 60% or equivalent grade from Graduation onwards, 55% or equivalent grade in class 10th and 12th
qualification.details: B.Tech./B.E./M.Sc./M.C.A./MBA/Professional qualification or equivalent in an appropriate discipline with a minimum of 05 years of post-qualification experience in planning and development/Administration/Project Management in an organisation/Industry of repute. The percentage/grade points with respect to the academic qualifications will be a minimum of 60% or equivalent grade from Graduation onwards, and 55% or equivalent grade in class 10th and 12th.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Gandhinagar to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Gandhinagar Program Manager-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Program Manager-I post at IIT Gandhinagar is 10-05-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Program Manager-I position?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Program Manager-I position at IIT Gandhinagar.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Program Manager-I role?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.Tech./B.E./M.Sc./M.C.A./MBA/Professional qualification or equivalent with at least 5 years of relevant experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to this post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Program Manager-I position is 40 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Program Manager-I post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 60,000/- to Rs. 93,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. Is there an application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for IIT Gandhinagar Program Manager-I jobs?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official website of IIT Gandhinagar.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Program Manager-I position is contract-based.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link is provided in the Important Links section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. Does IIT Gandhinagar offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Age relaxation details are not explicitly mentioned in the provided data; please refer to the official notification for specifics.
